pericopes.title: Pathen mi hepi, Jonah lung lhailou

chapters.text: Amit’tai chapa Jonah henga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin aseiye,
“Kipatdoh-in lang khopi lentah Nin’eveh khopia gachen, akhopi demna thu gaseiyin lhang gasamtan; ajeh chu agitlou nau keima angsung geiyin ahung kaltou tai,” ati.

Ahivangin Jonah chu akipatdoh loiyin Pakai angsunga konin Tarshish langa jam din akigotai. Jonah chu Joppa langa achesuh-in, Tarshish lam jon ding kong innei khat atoh khai; hijeh chun aman jong konga kitolman ding apen, kong innei sunga akaldoh paiyin, Pakai angsunga kona jamdoh a miho chutoh Tarshish lama che din akigoi.
Hichea hin Pakaiyin huipi hat tah khat ahin nunsah tan, Twikhanglen anuh tai, hijeh chun Twikhanglen chunga huile go hat tah-in ahung kithon, kong innei chu achomkeh pai ding ahitai.

Chuphat’in kong inneiya sepaite geiyin akichatauve; miho chu ama ama hou pathen kom cheh a ataosoh keiye. Chujongleh kong innei chu ajankhai theina ding atiuvin, asunga thilkeo gihsa thih tobang ho jouse chu Twikhanglen a asep lha lhauve. Jonah vang chu kong innei dan sung nung lampeh a akumsuh-in, thip beh chan agalumin kho hepha louvin aihmu mil del tai.

Hichun kong inneiya sepai lamkaipa chu ahungin Jonah jah a aseitai, “Hichea ihmupa, nangin ipi na-ngaito hitam? Thoudoh loiyin nang jong nahoupa pathen henga tao loiyin! Chutin bol leu hen pathen chun eihin gelkhoh theiyun tin, mangthah louva iumdoh thei diu ahi,” ati.

Miho jong chun aseiyun, khat le khat akihouvun, “Koijeh pen tah a hitobang hamsetna hi ichunguva hung lhung mong mong ham, ihetdoh theina diuvin vang san temu hite,” atiuve. Hijeh chun mihon vang asan’uvin chung lama aleuva ahileh Jonah chunga ahung chui.

Chutah chun mihon jong Jonah adonguvin, “Ipijeh pen tah a hiche thilse hi ichunguva hung lhung ham neiseipeh temuvin? Ipi natong mi nahiya, hoilama kona hung nahim? Nachenna gam hoi lam hiya, ipi nam mitea kona hung nahim?” atiu leh;
Jonah jong chun ajah uva aseiyin, “Keima Hebrew mi kahin, Twikhanglen le leiset sempa Pakai van Pathen chu ging jinga um mi kahi,” atitai.

Hichun miho jong akicha behseh jengtauve; hijeh chun Jonah jah a aseiyuvin, “Achutileh ipiba nabol khah hitam?” atiuvin ahi. Ijeh inem itileh aman aseipeh phat’a Jonah chu Pakai angsunga kona hung jamdoh ahi, ti miho chun ahetdoh cheh-u ahitai.

Chuphat’in amahon Jonah jah a aseiyuvin, “Twikhanglen kinongpi hi athip theina dinga nang hi iba kalo diu nahim?” tin adongtauve. Ajeh chu Twikhanglen chu khoh cheh cheh le hat cheh cheh a hui le go kitho tho jeng ahitai.

Hichea hin Jonah chun ajah uva aseipeh-in, “Neidom’uvin lang Twikhanglen laiya neileh lut jenguvin, chutileh nang ho din Twikhanglen hi thip tante; ajeh chu keijeh a hiche tobanga khoh hui le go kitho hin Twikhanglen anuh ahi, ti keiman kahenai, hiche hin nang ho nahinphah lojoh-u ahibouve,” ati.

Hijongleh miho chun kong innei chu leiset lama lhoh lut tei ding agouvin hatol tol’a atol vanguvin atoljou deh tapouve; ajeh chu Twikhanglen chu huipi le go kithon ahanuh cheh cheh jengin, amaho doulel lamtah-in akikhang jenge.

Hichejeh hin amaho jong Pakai henga ataovun, “Vo Pakai, nahenga hung tao kahiuve, hichepa hinsah nom jeh hin keiho geiyin neisuh mang dauvin, keiho vang themmona beiyin tha din neigel loujen uvin; ajeh chu Pakai nangin hiche hi nadei bang banga nabol ahinai,” atiuve.
Hiti hin mihon Johah chu adom’uvin Twikhanglen laiya aleh lut jeng tauve; hichun Twikhanglen jong hamlet lut’a akinon chu athip del tai.
Chuphat’in mihon Pakai chu hagin in aginguvin, Pakai henga kilhaina thilto abol’uvin, kitepna phabep asemdoh tauve.
Hichea hin Jonah val lhum din Pakaiyin ngapi khat angansei. Hiche ngapi oisunga hin Jonah chu nithum le jan thum sungin athamtai.
Ngapi oisunga konin Jonah jong Pakai a-Pathen henga ahung taovin,
hitin aseiye: “Kagenthei hesoh pet’a Pakai henga katao leh Pakaiyin eihou jin; Noimigam tobang ngapi oisunga kona katao jongleh Nangman ka-ogin najai.
Ajeh chu nangman kokhuh sunga neileh lut’in, Twikhanglen lailunga neisep lut tai; Kakimvel’a twisoh len akinongje jun. Nangma twi kinongle kidil hin eilonvuh soh ahitai.
Hichea hin, ‘Nangma koma kona paidoh a um kahitai, Nahouin theng chu itileh kanung mu kit ding hitam?’ kati.
Kachungvuma twipi akichisoh hel tan, Kavel’a lithuh tah tah adimset’in akimatsoh tai; Twikhanglen kidil hin eitom chah tan,

Molsang bul geiyin eitomjol tai. Akotgol jouse tonsot’a eikha khum jing thei Hitobang gamsunga chun kakumsuh tai; Hijeng jongleh hiche kokhuh sunga kon hin O Pakai ka-Pathen, nangin kahinkho neihuhdoh peh-e.
Kasunga kalungthim alengvai tan, Hijeh chun Pakai kageldoh tai; Nangma houin theng sunga chun Kataona nahenga ahung lhunge.
Pannabei milimdoi hou hon Atoh diu gunchuna jong alhaso tauve.
Kenvang thangvahna ogin beh hin Nangma henga kilhaina bol inge; Ipi hijongleh kitepna kaneisa chu kapeh tei ding ahin, Mihem huhdohna kiti hi Pakaiya ahibouve!” ati.
Chuphat’in Pakaiyin jong ngapi jah a aseipeh-in, hijeh chun ngapin jong Jonah chu leiset tolgo lah a alodoh tai.
Anivei nan Pakaiyin Jonah henga thu ahinsei kit tan, hitin aseiye,
“Kipatdoh loiyin lang keiman kahilsa thupha chu khopi lentah Nin’eveh khopia khun gaphongjal tan,” ati.
Hijeh chun Pakaiyin asol dungjuiyin Jonah jong akipatdoh paiyin Nin’eveh khopia chun achetai. Nin’eveh khopi kiti hi alet’a len ahin, availam seh seh jong nithum sunga jot khopset khol lampi alhinge.
Jonah hi akhopi sunga alut’in nikhat lhingset ajot pantai. Hichea hin Jonah hin asam samin, “Nisom li jou tengleh Nin’eveh khopi hi kileh khup ding ahi!” ati.
Hichun Nin’eveh khopia miten Pathen atahsan tauvin, an ngol ding asom’uvin khaodip pon jeng akisil’un, mihem alenpena pat aneopen geiyin hitobang hin achonsoh hel tauve.

Hiche thudol hi akithangin ahileh Nin’eveh khopi lengpa henga ahung lhungin, hijeh chun lengpa jong alaltouna konin akipatdoh paiyin, alal pon loupi ponchol chu ahoh lhan khaodip pon akisil’in, vutbouva atouvin lung hemtah-in an angol’e.

Chujongleh lengpa hin Nin’eveh khopi pumpia thungahna khat aphongdoh paiyin, “Lengpa le amilen amilalte thugah bang bangin, mihemin jong ganchan jong, bong hihen lang kelngoi hon hijongleh imacha cha neh dau hen; abonchauvin an nelouvin umu hen lang twi don louvin umu hen;

mihem jong gancha jong khaodip pon kisil’in umsoh keiyu hen lang, Pathen henga hatao taovin tao soh keiyu hen; miho abonchauvin thilse abol nau dalhau hen, akhut’uva pumhat’a thil abol’u chu lehlha soh keiyu hen.
Ijem itileh Pathen chu alung hang lheh jeng jong alung heimai theiyin tin eiho mangthah louva ium thei diu ahi,” atiuvin ahi.

Hitobanga thil abol’u hi Pathenin amudoh a, itobang tah a thilse lama kona kihei manguva, ki-engbol hiuvam, ti amudoh phat’in Pathenin alung aheitan, achunguva lhunsah dia aseisa thilse chu bolda din akoiyin, hiti hin ahaiyin abolda tai.
Pathen lunghei chu Jonah hin hatahin adeimon alung hang behseh jengin ahi.

Hijeh chun Jonah jong Pakai henga ataovin aseitai, “Vo Pakai nahenga hung tao kahi, hiche nabol ding ahi, tia keiman kachenna gamsunga kaum laiya pat kaseisa hilou ham? Hijeh a chu Tarshish lama anajamdoh loi jeng kahime; ijehinem itileh nang hi Pathen lungset them mi hepi them, lung hangvah lou, long louva lungsetna neijing thei Pathen, thilse boljo louva lunghei kitji Pathen nahi, ti kahetsa jing nahi.
Hichejeh hin vo Pakai nahenga katao jeng ahi, keima hinkho hi kilahdoh jengin lang neithat tan, ajeh chu keidin hin sangin thi aphatchomjoi,” atitai.
Ahin Pakaiyin aseipeh in, “Nalung hangpi hi pha nasah hinam?” ati.

Chujouvin Jonah jong khopi sunga konin apotdoh-in khopia kona niso lama atouvin, ama dingin lhambuh khat akisone. Hiche buh lim noiya hin atoujing in, akhopi chu ihungti mong mong ding ham, ti amuchet kahsea din atouve.

Hichea hin Pakai Pathenin umphung khat akedohsah tan, Jonah umna chu atomjol sah jengin, aluvum a lim in asonpeh tai; hitia hi bolpeh a alung hesoh chu lungmon din agoi. Hichun Jonah jong umphung khat’in ajamkhum chu akipah behseh jenge.
Ahinla ajing nikhon kho ahung vah phat’in Pathenin lung alhalut’in umgui chu aneuvin ahileh, umphung chu anechaiyun aumphung jong ago lhatai.

Nisa ahung sodoh phat man Pathenin nisa save vun asat sah jengin, nisa chun Jonah lujang asah a ahileh ama jong alha lhop jengin ahi; chuphat’in Jonah jong chun thi dingbou athumtan aseitai, “Kei dingin hinsang hin thima ma aphajoi,” ati.

Chutah chun Pathenin Jonah jah a aseitai, “Nangman hiche umgui hi na-it a phatah a nalunghan pi jeng thei hilou ham?” atileh; Jonah jong adonbut’in, “Phatah a lung hanga, thina khop hel’a lung hang mong mong kahiye,” ati.
Hichun Pakaiyin aseitai, “Nangin natulou hel hiche umgui hi nadip dampin, khanjong nakhansah thei lou ahin, jan kah a hung kehdoh a jan kah khatma mangthah kit ahitai.

Achutileh hiche Nin’eveh khopi, khopi lentah, akhosunga mihem sang ja khat le sang som ni jen chenga, ajet aveiya akiheina diu helouva umho leh gancha khujatpi khu ken kadip dampi lou dinga nabol ham?” ati.
